texto: There are two kinds of people in this world: givers and takers. I came to know that takers eat better, and the givers sleep better. So I want to be both. Because I want to eat and sleep both better for good health.
explicacao: Citação de Prachi panda sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “There are two kinds of people in this world: givers and takers. I came to know that takers eat be…” articula reflexao, health, better em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
